TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sonny_Boswell, title = Sonny_Boswell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sonny_Boswell} }

S.FORM: Sonny Boswell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1919, ryax sa tay nqu tay , Sonny Boswell, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1964) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Sonny Boswell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1919, ryax sa tay nqu tay , Sonny Boswell, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1964) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕonnj βos~ɕwell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj nqu taj , s~ɕonnj βos~ɕwell, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
